title: Mengers Sponge
description: changes the sponge to look like a Mengers Sponge
body:
Replaces the sponge with a Mengers Sponge. Don't ask me what the Mengers sponge is though, because all I know is that it is a cool looking shape that has something to do with math.

But anyway, I made a resource pack for it, and you can use the mini mengers sponges to make a big mengers sponge..

This pack was made and used for this video:
